llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: GDE/MF - Solution Architect Automotive (M/F/D)
job.description: Responsibilities: "You will be responsible for ensuring the operation and project delivery across all phases you will execute business requirements engineering and ensure provisioning of standard IT features - You will do error analysis and corrections of Incident and Problems (Provide 2nd and/or 3rd level support). - As part of our agile development team you will work on user stories, do the development and testing of new features. - With your extensive experience on the subject matter, you will guide, coach and train other team members build competencies for the respective modules. - You will be assigned projects where you will have end to end responsibility for all deliverables" Qualifications: "- Proven experience with SAP S/4HANA Transportation Management, including planning, execution, and charge/cost calculation processes.- Solid understanding of SAP TM Optimizer‑based planning and related configuration options.- Knowledge of integration technologies for SAP TM, including web services, event/data streaming, and interfaces to internal and external logistics systems.- Familiarity with Dangerous Goods (DG) processes and compliance checks within SAP TM, particularly in regulated industries such as chemicals."
